commands.repair_reason: The remaining blockers are concrete file-level repairs on the PR branch, but final merge still needs maintainer approval for the new public config surface.; Needs attention: The diff introduces secret-bearing transport override surfaces and unrelated generated hash drift, so security/supply-chain review is still needed before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Apply agent request overrides before the providerConfig return... (sha=5182587ff0e55f7ce3c77dd4d03f50c193f9bce5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds per-agent and per-cron provider request override types/resolution, threads agent IDs into model resolution, adds provider/model tests, and modifies a Canvas A2UI bundle hash.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review defects: source inspection of PR head and current main shows the protocol rejection, providerConfig early return, agents.list-dependent cron merge, and missing update persistence. There is no current-main bug reproduction because this PR adds a new feature surface.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are concrete file-level repairs on the PR branch, but final merge still needs maintainer approval for the new public config surface.
